sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f framework: increase position size (A) as standard deviation (D) is reduced, optimizing geometric growth (G). Stop cutting losses when marginal benefit reaches zero. Specific optimal_f value not provided by author.

source_rule_text: Reduce standard deviation more than arithmetic average HPR to improve geometric growth; cutting losses short benefits position sizing up to an optimal point beyond which further cuts provide no benefit.
